perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair speaks excitedly to the camera, wearing a green ribbed shirt. Insets show marshmallow manufacturing and a person eating. (2) She stands up, walks to a doorway, and picks up a large pink shipping box. She opens it to reveal several boxes of Cloud Theory marshmallows. (3) She sits back down with a professional microphone positioned near her mouth. She displays various boxes: Toasted Coconut, Strawberries & Cream, and an assortment pack. (4) She picks up individual marshmallows, shows them closely to the camera, then eats them, exaggerating her facial expressions of enjoyment. (5) Finally, she holds up two boxes and gestures toward the screen for a giveaway announcement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female vocals in Chinese start the video over upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop music. (2) Sound of a doorbell followed by the physical sound of a cardboard box being opened and rustling paper. (3) The female voice shifts to a lower, whispered tone typical of ASMR. (4) Loud, crisp, and high-fidelity sound effects of chewing and crunching are prominent as she eats. (5) The upbeat music continues in the background throughout, ending with a call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '美國・澳洲紅到不行？！雲朵棉花糖' (Red hot in USA/Australia?! Cloud Marshmallows). (2) Hook Text: '台灣絕對買不到？！' (Absolutely can't buy in Taiwan?!). (3) Educational Text: '購買方法1: 在澳洲・美國網購' (Purchase method 1: Online shopping in Australia/USA). (4) Descriptive Text: '香草口味', '草莓口味', '彩虹口味' (Vanilla flavor, Strawberry flavor, Rainbow flavor). (5) Hook Text: '抽獎辦法' (Giveaway rules) listing social media steps.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Unboxing -> ASMR Tasting -> Giveaway call-to-action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female host, 1 woman appearing in a secondary social media clip insert
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a light green long-sleeved ribbed top and subtle makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor setting with white walls, a black mesh chair, and a wooden floor. Some scenes show a doorway and hallway.

vocal_qualities.loudness: Loud during intro, soft during eating

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional food review aimed at generating interest and engagement for the brand Cloud Theory. By using the rarity of the product in the local market as a hook and demonstrating its sensory appeal through high-quality ASMR audio, the creator drives viewers toward a giveaway event to increase social media reach.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator unboxes a gift from the brand, highlights the logo repeatedly, and hosts a giveaway specifically for that brand's products.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Frequent use of Korean exclamations ('Jin-ja?', 'Mashisoyo') despite speaking Chinese.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video blends Mukbang and ASMR styles with high-energy vlog editing, targeting a Gen-Z audience interested in global food trends.
